title: 🌼Idol Story🎀 Mascot ✨Kizuna✨
desc:
Welcome to the  🌼Idol Story🎀 Mascot designer, featuring our website's mascot: Kizuna Hanasaki!

Create your own Kizuna with different accessories, and more! Use the paintbrush to change colors!

Our wish is to have a mascot who can bring together Love Live! fans from all over the world while being a relatable character for everyone. We want to empathize that Kizuna can be designed in many different ways! We encourage you to use inspiration from the Mascot designer to make Kizuna an idol they feel happiest to cheer on~

Want to share your design or share any fan art?
Go to our website or tag us on social media:
🌐 https://idol.st/
🕊 https://twitter.com/idoldotst
📸 https://instagram.com/idoldotst
